title: Amazing lawyer! 100% satisfied. Great results and great service
body: I was referred from one of my friends who was able to use Mr. Gurovich for several offenses and he was able to successfully fix every problem for my friend and then was able to do the exact same for me! He was a great lawyer from the second we started working and up until he got everything fixed, he was always available and responsive.

title: Excellent Service
body: David Gurovich Law Group is the most persistent and reliable team in Los Angeles. I had 5 cases and they were all dismissed thanks to their hard and diligent work! Highly recommend this team for all your traffic court needs. Extremely professional and always available to answer any questions and advise.

title: Red Light Camera - DISMISSED!!!
body: Awesome job, Dave, for dismissing my Red Light Camera citation! Hey everyone! My highest recommendations for Traffic Attorney services goes to GUROVICH LAW GROUP. This is a Performance-based recommendation, as Dave's firm took on a Red Light Camera case, with missed appearance and... DISMISSED!

title: True to His name!
body: I was in a very unique situation, where my freedom was at stake for a long period of time. Konstantin Gurovich fought to make sure the truth was presented, and I was free to be with my family and loved ones. Konstantin gave me my life back, and I am forever grateful to Him, and His office. I highly recommend his services.

title: Two cases with Gurovich Law - Already Won One!
body: We have two cases with Gurovich law. Once already won! (Car accident) Waiting for the second one. Happy to work with Konstantin.

title: Outstanding Service - Highly Recommend
body: I couldn't be more satisfied with the legal representation provided by Gurovich Law Group. From the moment I reached out, Konstantin showed his professionalism and knowledge. He navigated my case with skill and determination, something that was not possible he made it possible! I highly recommend Gurovich Law Group to anyone in need of legal assistance. Konstantin, thank you for outstanding service, may God protect you and your loved ones!

title: The Absolute Best - Look No Further
body: Gurovich Law Group has always been there for me and my family. Look no further, they are the absolute best. David and Rita are super knowledgeable and have always advised and represented me with the best results I could've hoped for. I have referred countless friends and they're still friends! I will always use their services and I recommend you do as well.

title: Best Lawyer in LA!
body: I am happy to recommend Gurovich Law Group. We've worked with them on several different legal transactions which resulted in a positive outcome. Mr. Constantin is always very responsive to our needs and extremely knowledgeable on all matters of the law, also very fairly priced. He's been in his field as a professional for many years which makes us very comfortable working with his group. Gurovich Law Group is happy to assist anyone seeking advice or any sort of assistance with legal matters which range from traffic citations, criminal defense, personal injury and more. Best Lawyer in LA!

title: Made Us Feel Welcome, Safe and Secure
body: Great law firm. They listened to all of our concerns carefully! Made us feel welcome, safe and secure. We most likely will be working with them on our case in the near future! Free parking on site!

title: This Law Firm Really Helped Me Out From Day One
body: This law firm really helped me out from day one. I initially spoke to Elon when I got bailed out and he really put me at ease. He then accommodated my work schedule, we met after hours in his office during the peak covid. Dmitry was at each of my court dates, explaining the process and calming my nerves. Overall I don't know how to thank them for all they did for me and my family. Thank you both from the bottom of my heart.

title: Great Job Disputing My Speeding Ticket!
body: I got a speeding ticket a few months ago! Gurovich law group helped me a lot to dispute it! Konstantin went to all my trials and did a great job! Would recommend to all my friends! Thank you guys!

title: #1 For Many Years - Always 100% Happy
body: Gurovich Law Group for me and my family as well as my friends has been #1 for many years now. Any issues or problems I know I can always rely on Dave to help me out. I have sent over dozens of clients to Dave, and they are always 100% happy. I'm not one of those people that raves about every person I meet just to advertise them. I advertise people and their work when I know that it is actually good and they stick to their word. I can always rely on them for quick updates and if they don't update me I know I can get a quick response. Highly recommend the Gurovich Law team.

title: Citation Dismissed in Its Entirety!
body: I got a speeding ticket in San Diego about 6 months ago and when I saw the cost, I just about fainted. It was over $600!!! I was going to contact one of those ticket fixing places that process hundreds of tickets a day, but heard they have low rates of success. I thought it'd be nice to get a little more personal attention for my ticket, and that's when I called Dave. I filled out a quick form, paid the small fee and I was done! I didn't have to show up to court, I didn't have to write any statements, and I just waited to hear back. Just got an e-mail today saying my citation was dismissed in its entirety! I couldn't have imagined this good of a result! I don't plan on getting anymore tickets, but if I do, I know who I'm calling!

title: Reliable, Great Attention to Detail
body: Had the absolute best experience with Dave. Reliable, great attention to detail, and best of all was able to get me out of a red light ticket. Five stars! Highly recommend.

title: Absolute Life Saver - They Truly Wanted the Best for Me
body: Gurovich Law has been an absolute life saver. Not only did they get me exactly what they fought for, but they also went out of their way to make sure I was ok. Both physically and emotionally. Getting into and recovering from a car accident isn't easy, but they were so attentive to me and my needs. My best advice to anyone is to trust the process and let them do what they do best. By the end of it, I felt like they were my friends and they truly wanted the best for me. And thanks to them I got exactly that, and I'm now able to take care of myself and my needs following the accident. There's no way I could have done this without them. Thank you to Rita and the rest of the staff at Gurovich Law.

title: Efficient with Great Results! Must Hire!
body: Wow! I highly recommend Gurovich Law Group for any of your traffic violation cases! I received a speeding ticket last year and went through the process of extending it on my own and going to the arraignment. I completely forgot about the court trial that had been set for today at 8:30 AM. They handled it perfectly!

title: A+ ALL THE WAY, HONEST, GOOD COMMUNICATION
body: I had a very unique interesting traffic case, he handled it perfectly, I had it dismissed. I found him very honest, open for new information, suggestions. He took his time to talk to me and work out a plan together.

title: Gurovich Law Group IS THE BEST!!!
body: Mr. Gurovich and his experienced team represented me in a personal injury case. I talked with several attorneys and law firms before contacting Gurovich Law Group. Unlike other lawyers feeding me the basics, Mr. Gurovich gave me a reality and options. He made me part of the process and allowed me to make informed decisions.

title: Personal Injury Case and Jury Trial
body: I absolutely love Konstantin! He picked up my case 2 days before arraignment after previous attorney dropped it and did everything to save it. I can't even describe how much time and effort he put into my complicated case and when he felt that case needed additional help, invited another attorney to assist. Truly dedicated!

title: Excellent lawyer with great customer service!!!
body: I do not usually post reviews but I want to share my experience with Konstantin. Aside from being a friendly and sincere person, he is a phenomenal attorney. He managed to get me out of 3 speeding tickets. Never even had to go to court. Thanks, Konstantin.

title: The Best Lawyer Ever!!!!!!!!!!!!
body: Mr. Gurovich is the most attentive, considerate and a hard working attorney I know. He is there every single step for all of his clients. Mr. Gurovich takes each case personally, and gives you his undivided attention, respect, and listens to everything you have to say. He will take the time to walk you through every step of your case, and answer all of your questions. I will recommend Mr. Gurovich to anyone who would ask me for an attorney; because I know for a fact that from Mr. Gurovich they will receive a 5 star treatment, and the BEST results there is!

title: Excellent Pricing and Experience
body: Konstantin Gurovich provided me with excellent customer service and dismissed both of my tickets! Hiring an Attorney can be quite pricey and you are not sure what to expect at times. Konstantin provides excellent pricing and an excellent experience. He is not only a trustworthy Attorney but a great person overall. I would strongly recommend Konstantin Gurovich for any legal issues you may have!

title: Great lawyer. Works hard for clients. Superb customer service.
body: Mr. Gurovich has been there when I needed him most. He gets the job done for the client. His expertise and knowledge has surpassed all others in my previous experiences. Trust is important for me. Mr. Gurovich and I were able to establish that trust from the very first day. Highly recommended.

title: Hire him - He is GREAT!
body: Konstantin handled two of my court cases. He was extremely professional and courteous. Made sure to keep my concerns under control by answering all of my questions, taking the time to provide status updates and following up with phone calls to relay status changes/news. And most importantly – He WON both cases!! I would highly recommend Konstantin to anyone seeking legal representation. He was absolutely wonderful.

title: Amazing Results. He's the Best!!
body: Dave helped me with a speeding ticket. I was about to get my license taken away and had to pay insane amounts of money to get this ticket taken care of. He was VERY helpful, answered all my questions and was available whenever I needed him. I wound up not getting my license suspended and my court fees got dropped a huge amount. He truly saved me in so many ways! I would HIGHLY recommend him to everyone I know, and I will use him for all future attorney matters that I might come across. He is very professional and knew exactly what he was talking about, which helped me a lot because I had no idea what I was doing.
